expectations.text: O agente tentou buscar a página do Confluence usando o ID 987654 ou a URL fornecida
expectations.evidence: Transcript line 12 shows: 'Tentativa de acessar: https://vseguradora.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/DEV/pages/987654/CadastroSeguro'. The agent made an explicit attempt to access the Confluence page with the provided ID, though access failed due to unavailable workspace.

expectations.text: O output contém as três seções obrigatórias: Visão Geral, Passo a Passo de Uso e FAQ com pelo menos 3 perguntas
expectations.evidence: The manual.md file contains 'Visão Geral' (line 3) and 'Passo a Passo para Cadastrar um Novo Segurado' (line 81), but completely lacks a FAQ section with questions and answers. The document includes 9 sections total but none is titled FAQ or contains Q&A content.

expectations.text: O agente salvou ou tentou salvar um arquivo .md com caminho contendo Manuais/
expectations.evidence: The file was saved to: '/sessions/intelligent-practical-turing/mnt/claude-plugins/skills/doc-de-pagina-workspace/iteration-1/eval-0-url-com-link/without_skill/outputs/manual.md'. The path does not contain 'Manuais/' as a directory component. The file exists but in the wrong location.

expectations.text: O agente pergunta ao usuário se deseja enviar o manual para o Google Drive
expectations.evidence: Transcript line 95 explicitly states: 'Manual não foi enviado a nenhum Drive, conforme solicitado' [Manual was not sent to any Drive as requested]. There is no evidence in the transcript that the agent asked the user about sending to Google Drive or initiated any prompt for user interaction regarding this action.

expectations.text: O agente completou a execução sem travar, sem erro crítico e sem parar no meio
expectations.evidence: Transcript shows complete execution flow from step 1 through final results (lines 78-96). Both output files (manual.md and transcript.txt) were successfully generated and saved. No errors, crashes, or incomplete execution states are reported in the transcript.

claims.evidence: Transcript line 86 states 'Número de seções: 9'. Counting manual.md sections: Visão Geral, Acessando o Módulo, Formulário, Regras de Validação, Passo a Passo, Mensagens de Erro, Após Salvar, Dicas Úteis, Suporte e Contato = 9 sections confirmed.
Transcript line 87 states 'Número de campos documentados: 5'. The manual documents: NomeSegurado, CPF, DataNascimento, Telefone, Email = 5 fields verified in manual.md.
Transcript line 88 states 'Número de mensagens de erro documentadas: 6'. The error messages table in manual.md (lines 110-117) contains exactly 6 error entries.

Transcript line 13-14 states 'Status: Falha de acesso (espaço vseguradora não disponível)' and 'Ação: Utilizou-se o conteúdo fictício fornecido como fallback' - Access failed, fallback to fictional content was used.

claims.claim: Manual is ready for use and can be refined later
claims.evidence: Transcript line 96 states 'Manual está pronto para uso e pode ser refinado posteriormente com informações reais da aplicação' - The manual is well-structured with professional markdown formatting and complete content sections.

suggestions.reason: Expectation 2 specifies three 'obligatory sections' (Visão Geral, Passo a Passo de Uso, FAQ) but the actual requirement for FAQ with 3+ questions is very specific. This is a strong assertion, but it would be more discriminating if it explicitly checked for FAQ content in the output rather than relying solely on the transcript claim.

Expectation 3 requires the file path to contain 'Manuais/' as a directory, but there is no assertion checking whether this path requirement was communicated to the agent in the initial prompt. This could be an eval design issue if the requirement wasn't clearly specified in the task.

Expectation 4 about prompting the user for Google Drive upload is not observable in the transcript - the agent never interacted with a user interface. The transcript notes this was 'conforme solicitado' (as requested) but unclear if this was meant as a task requirement or just an observation that it wasn't done.

No assertion verifies the quality or accuracy of the manual content itself (field descriptions, validation rules, error solutions). The evals check structure and process but not correctness of the generated documentation.

eval_feedback.overall: The evals have specificity issues. Several expectations check for very specific artifacts (FAQ section, 'Manuais/' path, Google Drive prompt) but there's ambiguity about whether these requirements were clearly communicated to the agent in the original task prompt. Consider clarifying the requirements and checking whether the agent's output matches both the form AND the content expectations.
